data.title: Breakout Alert: Ether, Bitcoin Cash-Bitcoin Ratio Break Downtrends as DOGE, SHIB Bottom Out
data.description:
This is a daily technical analysis by CoinDesk analyst and Chartered Market Technician Omkar Godbole.Traders looking for tokens that may see accelerated gains as bitcoin (BTC) rallies might want to focus on ether (ETH) and the ratio between bitcoin cash (BCH) and bitcoin.Both have broken prolonged downtrends alongside bullish bottom formations in leading meme tokens DOGE and SHIB.Ether breakoutEther's price has surged more than 8% today, piercing the trendline (see the left-hand chart) that represents the downtrend from December highs above $4,100
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/05/08/breakout-alert-ether-bitcoin-cash-bitcoin-ratio-break-downtrends-doge-shib-bottom-out

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to unfolded. data, the stablecoin transaction volume reached 1.82 trillion US dollars last month, setting a record high.

data.title: Ether.fi: Part of the protocol revenue in April will be used for ETHFI repurchase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum re-staking protocol Ether.fi Foundation announced that the protocol revenue in April totaled US$2.4 million (the average price of ETH was US$1,716). Part of the revenue will be used for ETHFI repurchase, and the repurchase execution update will be released soon.

data.title: Virginia Resident Sentenced for Funding ISIS with Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Department of Justice announced that Mohammed Azharuddin Chhipa, a 35-year-old resident of Virginia, has been sentenced to 30 years and 4 months in prison for financing the terrorist organization ISIS. Evidence presented in court revealed that between October 2019 and October 2022, Chhipa raised funds through social media and traveled hundreds of miles to collect cash. He then converted over $185,000 into cryptocurrency, which was transferred to Turkey and ultimately reached ISIS members in Syria. These funds were used to support ISIS militants and to rescue detained female members. In December 2024, a federal jury found him guilty on five counts, including conspiracy to provide material support to a foreign terrorist organization.

data.title: Stablecoin Trading Volume Reaches Record High in April
data.description: According to PANews, data from unfolded indicates that stablecoin trading volume reached a historic high of $1.82 trillion last month. This marks a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency market, reflecting increased activity and interest in stablecoins.

data.title: U.S. Senate to Vote on Updated Stablecoin Regulation Bill
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Senate is scheduled to hold a procedural vote on the updated version of the stablecoin regulation bill, known as the 'GENIUS Act,' at 1:45 PM Eastern Time (1:45 AM UTC+8). The vote follows late-night negotiations and last-minute text updates between Senate Republicans and Democrats, setting the stage for a contentious decision.

Previously reported by BlockBeats, the 'GENIUS Act,' or the 'Guidance and Establishment of National Innovation in U.S. Stablecoins Act,' was introduced in the Senate on February 4, 2025. The legislation aims to establish a comprehensive regulatory framework for 'payment stablecoins' within the United States. Its objectives include promoting financial innovation, protecting consumers, preventing illicit financial activities, and reinforcing the U.S. dollar's dominance in the global financial system.

data.title: Raoul Pal Predicts Bitcoin's Dominance May Have Peaked
data.description: According to Foresight News, former Goldman Sachs executive and Real Vision founder Raoul Pal recently tweeted his belief that Bitcoin's dominance may have reached its peak today. Pal noted the presence of daily, weekly, and monthly DeMark top signals, with the current peak level falling below the highs of 2021, which were themselves lower than the 2017 highs. If this assessment proves accurate, it could signal the onset of the next phase of the 'Banana Zone,' referring to the altcoin season. Pal encouraged observers to watch developments closely.

data.title: Stripe Integrates Stablecoins and AI Technology – Will AI Agent Coins Like $MIND Benefit?
data.description:
Stripe, the global payment solution provider, has launched Stablecoin Financial Accounts. It’s a new feature that will allow users to hold cryptocurrencies in the form of stablecoins. Currently, Stripe only supports two dollar-denominated stablecoins: $USDC and $USDB. However, Stripe will introduce support for more stablecoins in the future
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/stripe-integrates-stablecoins-and-ai-technology-will-ai-agent-coins-like-mind-benefit/

data.title: A whale deposited 8.58 million USDC into Hyperliquid to buy ETH with 2x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale created a new wallet and deposited 8.58 million USDC to Hyperliquid, going long on ETH with 2x leverage. Its entry price was $1,930.41, and the current unrealized profit is $354,000.

data.title: Superstate launches “Opening Bell” to support SEC-registered stock issuance and trading on the blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Superstate announced the launch of the "Opening Bell" platform, which supports the direct issuance and trading of SEC-registered stocks on the chain. The project will be deployed first on the Solana chain to achieve the native integration of traditional equity and blockchain infrastructure. Superstate has recently joined forces with several institutions to submit a framework proposal to the SEC. (The Block)

data.title: Bitcoin miner Hut 8 grows hashrate 79% despite $134M quarterly loss
data.description:
Cryptocurrency mining firm Hut 8 increased its hashrate by 79% during the first quarter of the year. According to Hut8’s latest quarterly report released on May 8, the firm saw a net loss of $134. 3 million despite revenue of $21. 8 million
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/hut8-q1-2025-hashrate-expansion-loss?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Digital asset trading infrastructure GoQuant completes $4 million seed round of financing, led by GSR
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset trading infrastructure GoQuant announced the completion of a US$4 million seed round of financing, led by GSR, with participation from Copper.co, Lombard Odie, Capital Union Bank, TYR Capital and FRNT Financial. The new funds intend to support its construction of smart order routing to cover CEX, DEX and OTC transactions, and accelerate the growth of the global institutional market.

data.title: Space and Time mainnet launched, providing ZK proof data for data-driven crypto applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Space and Time announced that its permissionless public mainnet has been officially launched. It is reported that Space and Time is a blockchain network that provides ZK proof data, which aims to enable smart contracts to securely access and use verifiable data from on-chain and off-chain through its ZK coprocessor Proof of SQL. The platform is able to index major blockchain data such as Ethereum and off-chain information, and supports querying and analyzing these data. The launch of this mainnet aims to enable developers to build more complex data-driven on-chain applications.
